SEARCH
モジュール org.commonutils
パッケージ org.commonutils.lang

クラス StringSupport

java.lang.Object
org.commonutils.lang.StringSupport
public final class StringSupport extends Object
Static helpers for String and CharSequence work: presence checks, safe defaults, content equality, and trimming helpers. Use this class when you want consistent, null-tolerant behavior across the codebase without repeating the same guards.

Null handling

Unless stated otherwise, null references are treated as "missing":
  • Predicates such as isEmpty(CharSequence) and isBlank(CharSequence) treat null like an empty or whitespace-only value.
  • Methods that return a String often map null to "" or a supplied default; see each method for exact rules.
This matches common utility conventions (and differs from calling String instance methods on null, which would throw NullPointerException).

Empty vs blank

Empty
null or length zero only. A string of spaces " " is not empty.
Blank
null, empty, or every character satisfies Character.isWhitespace(char). Use this for user-facing input where "only spaces" should count as no input.
Pair with defaultIfEmpty(String, String) vs defaultIfBlank(String, String) depending on whether spaces-only should fall back to a default.

Padding

padStart(String, int, char) and padEnd(String, int, char) repeat paddingChar until String.length() is at least minLength (same roles as leftPad/rightPad or JDK String.padStart/padEnd on releases that ship those methods). A null value is treated as "" before padding.

Trim vs strip

trimToEmpty(String) and trimToNull(String) delegate to String.trim(), which removes only leading/trailing characters with codepoint at most U+0020 (space and related ASCII control characters). They do not remove e.g. ideographic space U+3000.

stripToEmpty(String) and stripToNull(String) delegate to String.strip(), which removes Unicode whitespace at both ends (including U+3000). Prefer strip* for normalized user input; keep trim* when you need JDK trim() semantics or backward compatibility.

Equality

equals(CharSequence, CharSequence) and equalsIgnoreCase(CharSequence, CharSequence) compare content (code unit sequences), not object identity. left == right is only a fast path. They are null-safe: two null references are considered equal. equalsIgnoreCase(CharSequence, CharSequence) uses per-character case folding suitable for typical ASCII/Unicode strings; it is not a substitute for locale-sensitive Collator comparisons.

Length counting

length(CharSequence) and length(CharSequence, LengthCounter) measure size in different ways. Pass Lengths.UNITS for UTF-16 code units (Java String-style length), Lengths.POINTS for Unicode code points, or Lengths.EAW for East Asian display columns (UAX #11). Like Comparator, you can supply a custom LengthCounter when none of the built-in enum constants fit. null sequences count as length 0; the LengthCounter argument must not be null.

Examples


 // Defaults after optional form field
 String name = StringSupport.defaultIfBlank(rawName, "anonymous");

 // Parse-friendly normalization (Unicode spaces, including full-width)
 String token = StringSupport.stripToNull(userInput);
 if (StringSupport.isBlank(token)) {
     throw new IllegalArgumentException("token required");
 }

 // Safe equality for CharSequence from different implementations
 if (StringSupport.equalsIgnoreCase(headerValue, "gzip")) {
     // ...
 }
関連項目:
  • Character.isWhitespace(char)
  • String.trim()

  • Nullability annotations (org.commonutils.annotation.Nullable, org.commonutils.annotation.NonNull) document contracts on signatures; org.commonutils.annotation.NonNull-annotated reference parameters are validated at runtime with java.lang.NullPointerException where applicable.

    Numeric constraints (org.commonutils.annotation.NonNegative, org.commonutils.annotation.Positive) document ranges on signatures; implementations enforce them at runtime with IllegalArgumentException.

  • メソッドの概要

    修飾子とタイプ
    メソッド
    説明
    static @Nullable String
    defaultIfBlank(@Nullable String value, @Nullable String defaultValue)
    Returns defaultValue when value is null, empty, or blank; otherwise returns value unchanged.
    static @Nullable String
    defaultIfEmpty(@Nullable String value, @Nullable String defaultValue)
    Returns defaultValue when value is null or String.isEmpty(); otherwise returns value unchanged.
    static @NonNull String
    defaultString(@Nullable String value)
    Returns "" when value is null; otherwise returns value unchanged.
    static @Nullable String
    defaultString(@Nullable String value, @Nullable String defaultValue)
    Returns value when it is non-null; otherwise returns defaultValue.
    static boolean
    equals(@Nullable CharSequence left, @Nullable CharSequence right)
    Returns true if both sequences have the same length and the same char values at every index.
    static boolean
    equalsIgnoreCase(@Nullable CharSequence left, @Nullable CharSequence right)
    Like equals(CharSequence, CharSequence), but compares case-insensitively using Character.toUpperCase(char) and Character.toLowerCase(char) on each pair of characters.
    static boolean
    isBlank(@Nullable CharSequence value)
    Returns true if value is null, empty, or every code unit is Unicode whitespace per Character.isWhitespace(char).
    static boolean
    isEmpty(@Nullable CharSequence value)
    Returns true if value is null or CharSequence.isEmpty().
    static boolean
    isNotBlank(@Nullable CharSequence value)
    Negation of isBlank(CharSequence): true when value contains at least one character that is not whitespace.
    static boolean
    isNotEmpty(@Nullable CharSequence value)
    Negation of isEmpty(CharSequence): true when value is non-null and has length greater than zero.
    static @org.commonutils.annotation.NonNegative int
    length(@Nullable CharSequence s)
    Returns the UTF-16 code unit count: same as length(s, Lengths.UNITS).
    static @org.commonutils.annotation.NonNegative int
    length(@Nullable CharSequence s, @NonNull LengthCounter how)
    Returns a non-negative length count for s using how.
    static @NonNull String
    padEnd(@Nullable String value, int minLength, char paddingChar)
    Right-padding: repeats paddingChar after the content until the length is at least minLength.
    static @NonNull String
    padStart(@Nullable String value, int minLength, char paddingChar)
    Left-padding: repeats paddingChar minLength - length() times before the content so that the result length is at least minLength.
    static @NonNull String
    stripToEmpty(@Nullable String value)
    Returns String.strip() applied to value, or "" when value is null.
    static @Nullable String
    stripToNull(@Nullable String value)
    Returns String.strip() applied to value, or null when value is null or becomes empty after stripping.
    static @NonNull String
    trimToEmpty(@Nullable String value)
    Returns String.trim() applied to value, or "" when value is null.
    static @Nullable String
    trimToNull(@Nullable String value)
    Returns String.trim() applied to value, or null when value is null or becomes empty after trimming.

    クラスから継承されたメソッド java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • メソッドの詳細

    • isEmpty

      public static boolean isEmpty(@Nullable @Nullable CharSequence value)
      Returns true if value is null or CharSequence.isEmpty(). A string containing only spaces is not empty.
      パラメータ:
      value - sequence to test, may be null
      戻り値:
      true if value is null or has length 0
      関連項目:
      • isBlank(CharSequence)
      • isNotEmpty(CharSequence)

    • isNotEmpty

      public static boolean isNotEmpty(@Nullable @Nullable CharSequence value)
      Negation of isEmpty(CharSequence): true when value is non-null and has length greater than zero.
      パラメータ:
      value - sequence to test, may be null
      戻り値:
      true if value is not null and not empty
      関連項目:
      • isNotBlank(CharSequence)

    • isBlank

      public static boolean isBlank(@Nullable @Nullable CharSequence value)
      Returns true if value is null, empty, or every code unit is Unicode whitespace per Character.isWhitespace(char). Use for "nothing useful to show" checks on user input; for strict length-zero checks use isEmpty(CharSequence).
      パラメータ:
      value - sequence to test, may be null
      戻り値:
      true if value is null or has no non-whitespace characters
      関連項目:
      • isEmpty(CharSequence)
      • isNotBlank(CharSequence)

    • isNotBlank

      public static boolean isNotBlank(@Nullable @Nullable CharSequence value)
      Negation of isBlank(CharSequence): true when value contains at least one character that is not whitespace.
      パラメータ:
      value - sequence to test, may be null
      戻り値:
      true if value has at least one non-whitespace character
      関連項目:
      • isNotEmpty(CharSequence)

    • length

      @NonNegative public static @org.commonutils.annotation.NonNegative int length(@Nullable @Nullable CharSequence s)
      Returns the UTF-16 code unit count: same as length(s, Lengths.UNITS).
      パラメータ:
      s - text to measure, may be null (treated as length 0)
      戻り値:
      non-negative code unit count
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0
      関連項目:
      • Lengths.UNITS
      • CharSequence.length()

    • length

      @NonNegative public static @org.commonutils.annotation.NonNegative int length(@Nullable @Nullable CharSequence s, @NonNull @NonNull LengthCounter how)
      Returns a non-negative length count for s using how. null s counts as 0.
      パラメータ:
      s - text to measure, may be null
      how - counting strategy; must not be null
      戻り値:
      count from how
      例外:
      IllegalArgumentException - if how.count(s) is negative
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • defaultString

      @NonNull public static @NonNull String defaultString(@Nullable @Nullable String value)
      Returns "" when value is null; otherwise returns value unchanged. Same as calling defaultString(String, String) with "" as the default.
      パラメータ:
      value - input string, may be null
      戻り値:
      non-null string, never null
      関連項目:
      • defaultString(String, String)

    • equals

      public static boolean equals(@Nullable @Nullable CharSequence left, @Nullable @Nullable CharSequence right)
      Returns true if both sequences have the same length and the same char values at every index. null is handled safely: null equals only null.

      Unlike String.equals(Object), this method accepts any CharSequence (e.g. StringBuilder) on either side, so you can compare formatted text without allocating a new String.

      パラメータ:
      left - first sequence, may be null
      right - second sequence, may be null
      戻り値:
      true if both are null or both have identical content
      関連項目:
      • equalsIgnoreCase(CharSequence, CharSequence)
      • ObjectSupport.equals(Object, Object)

    • equalsIgnoreCase

      public static boolean equalsIgnoreCase(@Nullable @Nullable CharSequence left, @Nullable @Nullable CharSequence right)
      Like equals(CharSequence, CharSequence), but compares case-insensitively using Character.toUpperCase(char) and Character.toLowerCase(char) on each pair of characters. Suitable for protocol tokens, HTTP headers, and ASCII identifiers; for locale-sensitive natural-language equality, consider Collator instead.
      パラメータ:
      left - first sequence, may be null
      right - second sequence, may be null
      戻り値:
      true if both are null or both have the same length and match case-insensitively at each index
      関連項目:
      • String.equalsIgnoreCase(String)

    • defaultString

      @Nullable public static @Nullable String defaultString(@Nullable @Nullable String value, @Nullable @Nullable String defaultValue)
      Returns value when it is non-null; otherwise returns defaultValue. Uses ObjectSupport.requireNonNullElse(Object, Object): if both arguments are null, the result is null.
      パラメータ:
      value - preferred string, may be null
      defaultValue - fallback when value is null; may be null
      戻り値:
      value if not null, else defaultValue
      関連項目:
      • defaultString(String)

    • defaultIfEmpty

      @Nullable public static @Nullable String defaultIfEmpty(@Nullable @Nullable String value, @Nullable @Nullable String defaultValue)
      Returns defaultValue when value is null or String.isEmpty(); otherwise returns value unchanged. A string of only spaces " " is not empty—use defaultIfBlank(String, String) if whitespace-only should trigger the fallback.
      パラメータ:
      value - input string, may be null
      defaultValue - replacement when value is null or empty
      戻り値:
      value if it has length > 0, else defaultValue
      関連項目:
      • isEmpty(CharSequence)
      • defaultIfBlank(String, String)

    • defaultIfBlank

      @Nullable public static @Nullable String defaultIfBlank(@Nullable @Nullable String value, @Nullable @Nullable String defaultValue)
      Returns defaultValue when value is null, empty, or blank; otherwise returns value unchanged. Typical for optional form fields and configuration strings where users may submit only spaces.
      パラメータ:
      value - input string, may be null
      defaultValue - replacement when value is null, empty, or whitespace-only
      戻り値:
      value if it contains a non-whitespace character, else defaultValue
      関連項目:
      • isBlank(CharSequence)
      • defaultIfEmpty(String, String)

    • padStart

      @NonNull public static @NonNull String padStart(@Nullable @Nullable String value, int minLength, char paddingChar)
      Left-padding: repeats paddingChar minLength - length() times before the content so that the result length is at least minLength. Matches JDK String.padStart(int,char) semantics where that API exists (otherwise equivalent behavior built from String.repeat(int) and String.concat(String)). A null value is treated as "" before measuring length (see defaultString(String)).
      パラメータ:
      value - input string, may be null (treated as empty)
      minLength - desired minimum length; non-positive delta returns the coerced base string unchanged
      paddingChar - character to repeat on the left
      戻り値:
      padded string, never null
      関連項目:
      • padEnd(String, int, char)

    • padEnd

      @NonNull public static @NonNull String padEnd(@Nullable @Nullable String value, int minLength, char paddingChar)
      Right-padding: repeats paddingChar after the content until the length is at least minLength. Matches JDK String.padEnd(int,char) semantics where that API exists (otherwise equivalent behavior built from String.repeat(int) and String.concat(String)). A null value is treated as "" before measuring length (see defaultString(String)).
      パラメータ:
      value - input string, may be null (treated as empty)
      minLength - desired minimum length; non-positive delta returns the coerced base string unchanged
      paddingChar - character to repeat on the right
      戻り値:
      padded string, never null
      関連項目:
      • padStart(String, int, char)

    • trimToEmpty

      @NonNull public static @NonNull String trimToEmpty(@Nullable @Nullable String value)
      Returns String.trim() applied to value, or "" when value is null. Removes only leading and trailing characters with codepoint at most U+0020 (same as String.trim()); does not remove e.g. ideographic space U+3000.
      パラメータ:
      value - input string, may be null
      戻り値:
      trimmed string, never null
      関連項目:
      • stripToEmpty(String)

    • trimToNull

      @Nullable public static @Nullable String trimToNull(@Nullable @Nullable String value)
      Returns String.trim() applied to value, or null when value is null or becomes empty after trimming. See trimToEmpty(String) for which characters are removed.
      パラメータ:
      value - input string, may be null
      戻り値:
      trimmed string, or null if input was null or all trimmed away
      関連項目:
      • stripToNull(String)

    • stripToEmpty

      @NonNull public static @NonNull String stripToEmpty(@Nullable @Nullable String value)
      Returns String.strip() applied to value, or "" when value is null. Removes Unicode leading and trailing whitespace (including e.g. U+3000 ideographic space), per String.strip().
      パラメータ:
      value - input string, may be null
      戻り値:
      stripped string, never null
      関連項目:
      • trimToEmpty(String)

    • stripToNull

      @Nullable public static @Nullable String stripToNull(@Nullable @Nullable String value)
      Returns String.strip() applied to value, or null when value is null or becomes empty after stripping. See stripToEmpty(String) for which characters are removed.
      パラメータ:
      value - input string, may be null
      戻り値:
      stripped string, or null if input was null or all stripped away
      関連項目:
      • trimToNull(String)
